title: Maddison Project Database 2023 (Bolt & van Zanden 2024)
source_org: Groningen Growth and Development Centre, University of Groningen
retrieved_by: human (user manual download — automated retrieval was blocked by dataverse.nl's Cloudflare-protected file-API path even via a real rendered browser session; see prior failed-attempt log entries preserved in git history / conversation)
frequency: annual (sparse/interpolated in early centuries, dense from ~1820)
units: gdppc: 2011 international Geary-Khamis dollars (PPP-adjusted); pop: thousands
notes: Verified via pandas: sheet 'Full data' has columns [countrycode, country, region, year, gdppc, pop], 169 distinct countrycodes, year range 1-2022. Iran (IRN) confirmed present with data from antiquity (sparse) through 2022 (dense annual). This supersedes the earlier placeholder manifest that documented the automated-download failure -- that failure is preserved in this project's conversation history / logs/downloads/maddison-retry.log for reference. Harmonized into data/processed/macro_maddison.csv.
